title.en: Food plant: 90°C process water from 35°C wash effluent
title.zh: 食品厂：35°C 洗涤废水提升至 90°C 工艺热水

excerpt.en: Illustrative case: single-stage HFC/HFO heat pump replacing a gas boiler for CIP and wash water.
excerpt.zh: 示意案例：单级 HFC/HFO 热泵替代燃气锅炉，供应 CIP 与洗涤热水。

technology.zh: 单级螺杆蒸汽压缩热泵

result.zh: 示意约 70% 热水锅炉燃气替代

background.en: A mid-size food processor needed stable 85–90°C hot water. Existing gas boiler COP-equivalent was ~0.9 with rising carbon cost.
background.zh: 中型食品加工厂需要稳定 85–90°C 热水。原有燃气锅炉等效效率约 0.9，碳成本上升。

inputs.en: Source: wash effluent 32–38°C. Sink: process water 90°C. Duty: ~800 kW. Refrigerant candidate: R1234ze(E) / R515B class.
inputs.zh: 热源：洗涤废水 32–38°C。热汇：工艺水 90°C。负荷约 800 kW。工质候选：R1234ze(E) / R515B 类。

solution.en: Single-stage screw heat pump with plate evaporators on the waste stream and a water condenser. Economizer reserved for winter source drop.
solution.zh: 单级螺杆热泵：板式蒸发器取废水热量，水侧冷凝器供热水；冬季热源下降时预留经济器。

performance.en: Illustrative COP band 2.4–2.9 at design; annual gas displacement ~70% of hot-water boiler load.
performance.zh: 设计点示意 COP 约 2.4–2.9；年替代热水锅炉燃气负荷约 70%。

roi.en: Simple payback typically 3–5 years depending on electricity/gas spread and carbon price—verify with site tariffs.
roi.zh: 简单回收期通常 3–5 年，取决于电/气价差与碳价——须用现场电价核算。

q.en: Why not go straight to 120°C steam?
q.zh: 为何不直接做到 120°C 蒸汽？

a.en: Process only needed hot water. Targeting steam would force cascade/HTHP complexity without value.
a.zh: 工艺只需热水。上蒸汽会引入复叠/高温热泵复杂度却无对应收益。
